reviews.review_description: I just love flying in this game! It's dynamic and tense enough, and yet feels absolutely comfortable, even if you try to do some tricks. Also loved comments of AI companion. Nice fun game!
Even in early access, this game already stands out since there are barely any VR games like this on the store. Future updates are absolutely worth waiting for

Really cool VR space game. Flying around on the ship and fighting in space feels immersive, especially in VR. The atmosphere is nice and the game already feels surprisingly polished for early access. Also good that it doesn’t rely on heavy grinding like many other games do.

reviews.review_title: A diet version of End Space
reviews.review_description: I absolutely hate how you can't turn off the music, the enemies are tiny in comparison to your starship, and you have to be within 2 centimeters in order to lock onto the enemies, JUST FOR THE BULLETS TO HIT THEM! Oh and the boss I faced was just horrible. The only way I was able to stand a chance if it wasn't keeping a distance and just spraying and praying, LIKE A NORMAL PLAYER, I literally had to ram into the enemy ship on top of just endlessly shooting him. Other than that, every time I approached him normally, he took out the Lumenveil way faster than I could take him out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share this - detailed feedback like this genuinely helps. Music toggle is coming in the next update. 
Targeting range and boss balance are noted and will be addressed as well.

reviews.review_description: Starpath is a surprisingly immersive VR space game with smooth flying mechanics, intense spaceship combat, and a story that actually keeps you interested between missions. The visuals are clean and atmospheric, with beautiful planets, space stations, and effects that look great in VR without overwhelming the player. One of my personal favorite VR games so far!
I always get dizzy in VR but this game was totally fine. Really enjoyed it
